title: France leads way in plans to shift away from fossil fuels at summit
description: Macron government sets out so-called roadmap ‘with a clear deadline’

title: Were enormous octopuses apex predators in ancient oceans? - The Conversation
description: Were enormous octopuses apex predators in ancient oceans? title: Were enormous octopuses apex predators in ancient oceans?
description: A newly discovered fossil suggests octopuses up to 19 metres long may have hunted in Cretaceous seas.

title: Ancient graves reveal unexpected link to modern Andean people
description: The findings also reveal that while people in other regions resorted to violence, inhabitants of the Uspallata Valley lived peacefully with migrants during a time of crisis.

title: InMobi Launches “Ad Experiences” With FOSSIL as First Brand Partner
description: SAN MATEO, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--InMobi, the global technology leader specializing in agentic commerce and advertising, today announced the official launch of InMobi Ad Experiences.
